ads.ad_title: Polar Bear Ice Cream Sundae — Zomato Collab Ad

style.overall_style: Bright, playful, co-branded horizontal banner with illustrated background texture

design_language.approach: Co-branded partnership ad — both brand logos present, text-dominant left, product-dominant right
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Large headline text left → hand-held product center-right → discount badge overlaid on product
design_language.composition: Left-right split — bold typographic headline on left, product photo on right with badge overlay
design_language.depth: Flat illustrated background with slightly raised product photography layer
design_language.border_element: Circular badge/sticker overlay on product for discount callout

color_logic.primary_background: Sky blue — bright, light, cheerful (matches Polar Bear brand identity)
accent_colors: Dark navy/black (repeated brand name watermark pattern in background)
Warm cream and chocolate brown (ice cream product colors)

text_colors.main_headline: Yellow/gold — large and warm against blue

color_logic.color_emotion: Sky blue and yellow create a sunny, ice cream parlor feel — warm yellows against cool blue drive appetite and happiness simultaneously

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold, wide display sans-serif, all caps — very large
typography.headline_size: Dominates left 55% of frame — extremely large scale
typography.supporting_text_style: Clean sans-serif for Zomato brand name
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase Zomato signature font — bottom left
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Main headline largest → secondary line large → Zomato brand name small
typography.text_case: All caps for headline, lowercase for brand names

text_placement.primary_headline: Left half of frame, center-vertically stacked
text_placement.discount_badge: Overlaid on product, right side center

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Right-center — hand holding branded Polar Bear ice cream cup, slightly angled
graphics_and_image_placement.background_pattern: Repeating 'POLAR BEAR' text watermark in darker blue across entire background
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: Partial hand visible holding product from below
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Clean product shot on illustrated/textured background

message_delivery.primary_message: Co-branded promotional offer combining restaurant brand with delivery platform
message_delivery.strategy: Brand partnership visibility — both logos prominent, playful copy drives emotional engagement before discount
message_delivery.cta_style: Badge callout for discount — implicit order CTA through Zomato branding
message_delivery.urgency_level: Medium — discount badge present but not the lead element

ads.ad_title: Starbucks Grande Coffee — Zomato Collab Ad

style.overall_style: Premium dark green brand-consistent ad with magical/festive sparkle overlay

design_language.approach: Full brand-immersive — Starbucks green dominates, product floats center, text above and below
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Starbucks logo top-left → headline text upper-center → product center → discount banner bottom
design_language.composition: Centered product with symmetrical text layout above and below, sparkle elements scattered throughout
design_language.depth: Flat brand-color background with scattered gold sparkle/star particles adding festive depth
design_language.border_element: Green banner/ribbon with star icons flanking free delivery text at bottom

color_logic.primary_background: Deep Starbucks green — rich, consistent with brand identity
accent_colors: Gold/amber sparkle particles scattered across background

text_colors.headline: Warm cream/ivory — elegant against deep green

color_logic.color_emotion: Deep green with gold sparkles creates a premium festive atmosphere — signals luxury and celebration, aligned with Starbucks brand premium positioning

typography.headline_font_style: Elegant serif or semi-serif, mixed case — premium feel
typography.headline_size: Large, occupies upper third of frame
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase Zomato signature, top right corner
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Discount percentage largest → headline text large → free delivery medium → brand names small
typography.text_case: Mixed case headline (premium feel), all caps for discount

text_placement.free_delivery_banner: Lower center — green ribbon with stars

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center frame — tall iced coffee glass, floating on clean background
graphics_and_image_placement.sparkle_elements: Gold star/sparkle particles scattered across entire background — denser near product
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Clean floating product shot, no surface or table visible — ethereal presentation

message_delivery.primary_message: Premium brand + delivery platform partnership with strong discount
message_delivery.strategy: Brand prestige first — Starbucks equity borrowed to elevate perceived value of ordering through Zomato
message_delivery.cta_style: Discount banner with ribbon is the implicit CTA — both brand logos anchor trust
message_delivery.urgency_level: Medium-high — 60% off is prominent but premium aesthetic softens urgency

ads.ad_title: 60% Off Burger Combo — Zomato Dark Background Ad

style.overall_style: Dark dramatic food photography with bold warm-toned typographic discount overlay

design_language.approach: Dark gradient background — text upper zone, full food spread lower zone
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Discount text dominates upper 35% → food combo anchors center-lower → brand name bottom
design_language.composition: Two-zone layout — dark upper text block, food photography fills lower 60%
design_language.depth: Dark vignette background with round wooden serving board creating depth and focus

color_logic.primary_background: Deep dark red/maroon with black vignette — moody restaurant atmosphere
color_logic.color_emotion: Dark maroon/red background creates drama — warm cream typography and golden food tones make the entire composition feel indulgent and appetizing

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold condensed sans-serif, all caps
typography.headline_size: 60% OFF is enormous — fills nearly 25% of total frame height
typography.supporting_text_style: Bold sans-serif, slightly smaller, all caps
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage number largest → OFF large → supporting text medium → brand name base

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center to lower frame — burger, fries, ketchup, and cola on round wooden board on circular black table
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Dark deep red/maroon with black vignette around edges
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Eye-level shot, slight downward angle, food styled to look abundant and fresh

message_delivery.strategy: Dark premium staging elevates fast food to restaurant quality — discount text converts the appetite response into action
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — first order exclusivity and 60% discount stack creates strong conversion trigger

ads.ad_title: ZPL Hand Cricket — Zomato Gamification Ad

style.overall_style: Sports gamification campaign with 3D illustrated characters and stadium backdrop

design_language.approach: Cinematic sports poster aesthetic — stadium environment, 3D character hands, bold headline
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Bold headline top → 3D character hands flanking center logo → platform CTA bottom
design_language.composition: Symmetrical — two oversized 3D hands from left and right bottom, meeting at center with logo, headline above, CTA below
design_language.depth: Strong cinematic depth — stadium in background with floodlights and sky, grass foreground, hands in mid-ground
design_language.border_element: Emblem/shield logo badge at center — ZPL branding with cricket ball element

color_logic.primary_background: Bright blue sky gradient fading to stadium green — sports arena ambiance
accent_colors: Royal blue (left foam/cartoon hand — team color)
Bright orange/red (right foam/cartoon hand — opposing team color)

text_colors.headline: Pure white — bold, large, high contrast against blue sky

color_logic.color_emotion: Blue vs orange creates natural sporting rivalry tension — bright stadium lighting creates excitement and energy, green pitch grounds the scene in cricket authenticity

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold wide sans-serif, all caps — sports poster style
typography.headline_size: Very large — spans full width of upper frame
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase Zomato signature, inline with CTA
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Headline largest → CTA medium → Zomato brand name medium
typography.text_case: All caps for headline, mixed case for CTA

text_placement.primary_headline: Upper center, top quarter of frame
text_placement.logo_badge: Center frame — between the two hands
text_placement.brand_name_zomato: Inline with CTA text, bottom center

graphics_and_image_placement.main_visual: Two oversized 3D cartoon foam hands — blue (left) and orange/red (right) — rising from bottom corners, meeting at center
graphics_and_image_placement.logo_badge: Center mid-frame — circular emblem with ZPL branding and cricket elements
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Photorealistic cricket stadium with blue sky, floodlights, crowd stands, green pitch
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: 3D stylized hands (not realistic human — cartoon/foam fan hands)
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: CGI/3D illustration layered over photorealistic stadium background

message_delivery.primary_message: Gamification feature promotion — interactive cricket game within the Zomato app
message_delivery.strategy: Emotional sports excitement transferred to app engagement — cricket cultural relevance drives curiosity and participation
message_delivery.cta_style: Direct action CTA — play and win messaging
message_delivery.urgency_level: Medium — excitement-driven rather than price-driven urgency

ads.ad_title: Indian Snacks 60% Off — Zomato Dark Maroon Ad

style.overall_style: Dark moody Indian food photography with warm retro props and bold discount overlay

design_language.approach: Dark textured background, multiple food dishes arranged in scene, text overlaid lower-center
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Zomato logo top-right → food spread takes 65% of frame → discount text lower-center
design_language.composition: Food arrangement fills most of frame — multiple dishes at varying heights create depth, text floats in lower open space
design_language.depth: Rich depth — background wooden shelf with vintage radio prop, mid-ground dark surface with multiple dishes

color_logic.primary_background: Deep crimson/maroon with dark brown wooden elements — rich and moody
accent_colors: White and cream (dahi/yogurt topping on chaat)
Dark black plates (contrast surface for food)
color_logic.color_emotion: Deep maroon and dark wood create an old-Delhi, authentic dhaba or Indian kitchen atmosphere — warm food tones against dark background create theatrical appetite appeal

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold condensed sans-serif, all caps
typography.headline_size: 60% OFF large — but intentionally smaller than other ads, allowing food to be primary hero
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage largest → supporting offer text medium → brand name small
typography.text_case: All caps for offer text, lowercase brand

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_images: Multiple dishes — samosas on dark plate (upper left), fried snacks on dark square plate (lower left), chaat bowl (right center) — arranged in triangular composition
graphics_and_image_placement.prop_elements: Vintage wooden radio in background upper right, wooden paneling background
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Deep crimson/maroon textured surface with wooden elements
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Slightly elevated angle, moody studio lighting, multiple dishes create abundant spread feel

message_delivery.primary_message: First order discount on Indian snacks/comfort food
message_delivery.strategy: Nostalgia and authenticity of Indian snacks is the emotional hook — vintage props amplify cultural connection before discount converts
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand name top right, discount text is the conversion element
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — first order exclusive with 60% stack

ads.ad_title: 60% Off Pizza Combo — Zomato Black Background Ad

style.overall_style: Dark premium food photography with bold warm-toned typographic discount overlay

design_language.approach: Black upper zone for branding and text, realistic table-scene food photography lower zone
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Brand name top → discount text center-upper → full food spread fills lower 55%
design_language.composition: Two-zone layout — solid black upper block for text hierarchy, warm food photography below
design_language.depth: Strong depth — dark wooden table recedes into background, food items layered at different distances

color_logic.primary_background: Pure black upper zone transitioning to deep mahogany wooden table surface
color_logic.color_emotion: Pure black creates maximum contrast for cream typography — warm wooden table and food colors create appetite appeal against the stark upper zone

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold wide condensed sans-serif, all caps
typography.supporting_text_style: Bold sans-serif, slightly smaller, all caps
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage number largest → OFF large → supporting text medium → brand name top-small
typography.text_case: All caps promotional text, lowercase brand

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Lower 55% — full pizza on wooden board centered, garlic bread upper-left, cola upper-right
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Solid black upper zone, warm mahogany wooden table lower zone
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Overhead slightly angled shot — hero pizza centered, supporting items flanking symmetrically

message_delivery.primary_message: Maximum discount on first delivery order
message_delivery.strategy: Black background elevates food to gallery-quality display — premium staging justifies ordering, discount drives conversion
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand name at top, no explicit order button
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — first order exclusive creates acquisition urgency

ads.ad_title: Chaayos Tea Break — Zomato Collab Ad

style.overall_style: Brand-consistent illustrated green background with lifestyle food photography and playful typography
style.mood: Fresh, warm, everyday, accessible, cheerful, Indian

design_language.approach: Co-branded partnership — Chaayos brand green dominates, food products arranged in lower zone, illustrated background adds depth
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Dual logos top → bold headline upper-left → product spread lower-center → free delivery callout overlaid
design_language.composition: Illustrated background layer → product photography layer → text overlay layer — three distinct depth planes
design_language.depth: Illustrated doodle/pattern background gives visual texture, products appear raised above it
design_language.border_element: Yellow horizontal band/stripe at the very bottom of frame — Chaayos brand accent

color_logic.primary_background: Chaayos brand green — medium saturated, energetic
accent_colors: Yellow/mustard (bottom band accent, headline typography highlight)
Muted illustrated doodle pattern in darker green on background

text_colors.main_headline: White with yellow accent on key word — creates emphasis
text_colors.brand_names: Chaayos green logo top-left, Zomato white top-right

color_logic.color_emotion: Green signals freshness, health, and the Chaayos brand identity — yellow accent adds warmth and energy, creating a cheerful tea-break feeling

typography.headline_font_style: Bold display sans-serif, all caps — large and punchy
typography.headline_size: Large — takes up upper-left quarter of frame
typography.supporting_text_style: Bold sans-serif for discount, decorative script-adjacent for free delivery
typography.brand_name_style: Chaayos custom logo top-left, Zomato lowercase top-right
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Headline largest → discount text medium → free delivery medium → brand names small
typography.text_case: All caps headline, mixed case for secondary text

text_placement.primary_headline: Upper left, below logos — stacked lines
text_placement.free_delivery_text: Center-left, with decorative arrow, overlaid on product area

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_images: Lower center — Chaayos tea carton box (upper-right of product zone), chai cup (right), food dish/poha (left) — arranged in overlapping triangular cluster
graphics_and_image_placement.background_illustration: Scattered doodle/icon illustrations (tea leaves, cups, chai-related motifs) in darker green across entire background
graphics_and_image_placement.bottom_band: Solid yellow/mustard horizontal stripe at very bottom

message_delivery.primary_message: Co-branded discount offer — Chaayos products delivered via Zomato
message_delivery.strategy: Brand affinity transfer — Chaayos loyal customers are targeted, Zomato delivery convenience is the value-add
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — discount and free delivery are the conversion elements, logos anchor trust

ads.ad_title: Biryani By Kilo — Zomato Collab Dark Food Ad

style.overall_style: Dark rustic food photography with authentic handcrafted product presentation and badge discount overlay
style.mood: Authentic, traditional, rich, premium-casual, warm, artisanal

design_language.approach: Product-hero — large clay pot biryani dominates frame, text minimal and overlaid, discount as physical badge element
design_language.visual_hierarchy: BBK logo top-left → headline text upper-center → clay pot biryani dominates center → discount badge overlaid on pot → Zomato brand bottom
design_language.composition: Full-bleed food photography with text overlay top and brand bottom — pot is the undisputed visual hero
design_language.depth: Very strong depth — dark wooden background, red checkered cloth draped under pot, dark cast iron elements visible at edges
design_language.border_element: Circular/oval badge with 'UPTO 60% OFF' overlaid directly on the clay pot — feels like a physical price tag

color_logic.primary_background: Very dark brown/black — deep rustic kitchen/restaurant environment
accent_colors: Terracotta orange/brown (clay handi pot — dominant warm focal color)
Gold/yellow (BBK logo and discount badge accent)
Warm skin tone or red — badge background

text_colors.headline: White and yellow/gold — dual color headline for hierarchy

color_logic.color_emotion: Dark background with warm terracotta and saffron gold creates an intensely authentic, traditional dum biryani atmosphere — the clay pot is immediately culturally recognizable and evokes artisanal craftsmanship

typography.headline_font_style: Bold sans-serif, mixed weight — some words in white regular, key word in bold yellow for emphasis
typography.headline_size: Medium-large — understated to let the product be the hero
typography.brand_name_style: BBK custom logo top-left, Zomato lowercase bottom-center
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Yellow emphasis word largest visually → white headline text large → badge text medium → brand names small
typography.text_case: Mixed case headline, all caps badge

text_placement.discount_badge: Center-right, overlaid directly on clay pot body
text_placement.voucher_element: Small Biryani By Kilo branded card/voucher overlaid at lower-right of pot

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center-dominant — large clay handi pot filled with biryani, takes up 60% of total frame
graphics_and_image_placement.prop_elements: Red checkered cloth draped under pot, dark cast iron elements at frame edges, dark wooden surface
graphics_and_image_placement.discount_badge: Circular badge overlaid on pot body — feels like physical tag
graphics_and_image_placement.voucher_graphic: Small branded paper card overlaid on pot lower-right — adds authenticity
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Very dark brown/black rustic wooden surface
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: None — pure product and prop styling
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Slightly elevated angle, dramatic moody lighting, clay pot styled as artisanal centerpiece

message_delivery.primary_message: Co-branded premium biryani delivery with strong discount
message_delivery.strategy: Heritage and authenticity of BBK brand (clay pot dum biryani) creates perceived premium value — 60% discount creates powerful contrast between quality perception and price
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — discount badge on product, Zomato brand at bottom serves as order platform anchor
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — 60% off on a premium positioned product creates strong conversion incentive

consistent_zomato_elements: Lowercase 'zomato' logotype in clean sans-serif — always present, usually bottom-center or top-right corner
White as universal text color across all ads for maximum contrast
60% OFF appears in 6 of 8 ads — standardized first-order acquisition offer
High-quality professionally styled food photography as primary visual anchor in all product ads
Portrait/vertical format (7 of 8 ads) optimized for mobile Stories and Feed placement
Warm cream/off-white typography preferred over pure white in dark background food ads — signals premium feel

co_branding_pattern.approach: Partner brand logo placed top-left, Zomato logo top-right or bottom-center — clear visual hierarchy of restaurant brand first, delivery platform second
co_branding_pattern.color_strategy: Partner brand's primary color dominates background — Zomato adapts its white logo to fit any environment
co_branding_pattern.message_strategy: Partner brand drives food category desire and trust, Zomato delivers the discount and convenience layer

cross_ad_patterns.design_language_summary: Across these 8 ads, Zomato uses three distinct visual tracks: (1) Dark moody food photography (black/maroon/dark brown backgrounds) for premium food category ads; (2) Brand-color-dominant co-branded ads where partner restaurant's identity takes visual lead; (3) Gamification/campaign ads with CGI and illustrated environments for interactive features. All tracks are unified by bold white/cream typography, large price/discount numbers, and mobile-first vertical composition.
cross_ad_patterns.color_strategy_summary: No single Zomato red dominates this set — instead, Zomato adapts its palette to the partner brand or food category: deep blacks and maroons for premium Indian/Western food, partner brand greens for Starbucks and Chaayos, sky blue for Polar Bear, sports arena blues for ZPL. The 60% OFF typography is consistently warm cream/yellow across dark-background ads, signaling value without feeling cheap.
cross_ad_patterns.typography_strategy_summary: All promotional ads follow the same typographic rule: the discount number or price is always the single largest element. Headline copy is bold, condensed, all-caps sans-serif. Co-branded ads introduce partner brand typography where appropriate. The Zomato brand name remains consistently small and lowercase — always present but never competing with the main message.
cross_ad_patterns.image_strategy_summary: Food is always styled to maximum appetite appeal: clay pots for biryani (authenticity), floating glasses for Starbucks (premium), multiple dishes spread for Indian snacks (abundance), and hand-held cups for ice cream (intimacy). Backgrounds consistently use dark surfaces (wood, fabric, stone) to make food colors pop. Non-food ads (ZPL cricket) use CGI and cinematic stadium photography for maximum excitement.
cross_ad_patterns.message_delivery_strategy: Three distinct messaging tracks observed: (1) First-order acquisition ads — 60% OFF prominently drives new user conversion; (2) Co-branded awareness ads — partner brand equity + Zomato discount creates dual-trust purchase motivation; (3) Engagement/gamification ad (ZPL) — non-transactional, drives app interaction and session depth. All formats prioritize thumb-stop visual impact optimized for mobile social scroll behavior.
layout_archetypes_identified: Center-float product with text above and below (clean/pastel background)
Full-bleed food with overlaid text and badge (dark moody)
Dual-logo co-branded header with illustrated background
Cinematic sports poster with CGI characters
